# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart deployment template that always pulls the latest container images. Set imagePullPolicy to Always so users get the newest versions. This is for our fast-moving development environment where we deploy multiple times per day.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1beta2
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: deployment-name
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: app-name
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: app-name
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: app
          imagePullPolicy: Always
<pr_diff><pr_file>/exercises/02-first-deployment/create-a-helm-chart-deployment.md<pr_diff_hunk>@@ -3,19 +3,75 @@
 
 Requirement: Create a Helm chart deployment template that always pulls the latest container images. Set imagePullPolicy to Always so users get the newest versions. This is for our fast-moving development environment where we deploy multiple times per day.
 
+### Solution 1 - Answers are provided at bottom of page
